prompt:
Unique, collectible NFT character in bold cartoon style. 
Background: Stone gate structure surrounded by graffiti and vines. 
Head: Shiny, dark vinyl surface with slight texture. 
Eyes: Blinking causes shattering light animation across the face.. 
Clothing: Radiant cloak channeling energy from the Vertical Core. 
Color: Urban olive drab. 
Species: Flamehead. 
Only visible text: 'VERT'. 
Bold outlines, cel-shading, flat colors, no gradients, no photorealism.
